package rulefixtures

// scenario for bufio_writer_missing_in_bulk_export: File or socket writes inside loops without visible bufio buffering.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule344NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario344Negative(records []Rule344NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
